Class ContextStatementBlock

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
recoder.java.statement.JavaStatement
recoder.java.StatementBlock
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.ContextStatementBlock
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYRecoderExtension, Serializable, Cloneable, TypeDeclarationContainer, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, ScopeDefiningElement, SourceElement, Statement, StatementContainer, TypeScope, VariableScope, ModelElement
public class ContextStatementBlock extends StatementBlock implements KeYRecoderExtension
Statement block.
